yakisoba-recipe-with-vegetables-lezzet.name: Yakisoba Recipe With Vegetables

ingredients.item: 200 gr approximate noodles or ramen noodle (hazard, boiled)
1 tablespoon of oster sauce (or worcestershire sauce)
Japanese rubisoba noodle can be used instead of ramen noodle, egg noodle or spaghetti.
Rice noodle is also suitable for non-Gluten free choice.
Garlic instead of powder or garlic
Fresh onion instead of pırasa or green onion
Mantar (shiitake, enoki), deniz yosunu (nori) veya bambu filizi eklenebilir.
You can increase protein by adding chicken, shrimp or tofu.
